- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	<!-- Requirements already specified: JavaScript dungeon crawler game -->

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	<!-- Project structure created manually with HTML, CSS, and JS files -->

- [x] Customize the Project
	<!-- Implemented game features: characters, dungeon, combat, experience -->

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
	<!-- No extensions needed -->

- [ ] Compile the Project
	<!-- No compilation required for vanilla JS -->

- [ ] Create and Run Task
	<!-- No tasks needed -->

- [x] Launch the Project
	<!-- Opened index.html in browser -->

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	<!-- README.md created and instructions cleaned -->

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
